title: MinecartSpeedDisplay
description: A mod that displays the speed of a minecart.
body:
# MinecartSpeedDisplay

[![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-Bi2Nb9O3%20Studio-brightgreen.svg)](https://github.com/Bi2Nb9O3-Studio)
[![Mod Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod_Loader-Fabric-orange.svg)]("https://fabricmc.net")

![Licence](https://img.shields.io/badge/licence-LGPL_3.0-pink.svg)
![GitHub Actions Workflow Status](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/Bi2Nb9O3-Studio/MinecartSpeedDisplay/gradle.yml)
![GitHub Downloads (all assets, all releases)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Bi2Nb9O3-Studio/MinecartSpeedDisplay/total)

## Functions and Features

### Hot Keys
- **Toggle** : Turn on or off the mod (Default: `P`)
- **Track Start** : Start to track a minecart. Aim the minecart with the crosshair to choose the minecart to track. (Default: `\`)
- **Track Stop** : Stop tracking the minecart. (Default: `[`)
- **Clear Track Points** : Clear all the track points.

### Display

The mod will display the speed of the minecart and track the speed of the minecart during the minecart is moving.
![Minecart speed display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2859874476baff6e10be47e3c1b584be3945b923.png)
![Speed display while sitting on a minecart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fedeb02b3c3821775811517e21c1b37c3405b228.png)
![Example of minecart tracks display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d221425421a6293c74cdd20c27ff935a7ef7efbc.jpeg)

Maximum number of tracking points: 1000
Tracking point recording rate: 1 point per 2Tick
The tracking feature is only available in 1.21.11 (mod version 0.2).

### Why make it?

Mojang made a number of changes to the snapshot version 24w33a (including changes for minecarts). The mod will help players know the speed of the minecart and design machines.

### Future plans

- The mod will **continue to provide support** for new mc versions(not snapshots).
- The mod will **not** have support for the **Forge loader**.

## Requirements

----------------
|Item | Version |
|-----|---------|
|Minecarft| 1.21.1 1.21.4 1.21.11 |
|Fabric | 0.16+ |
|Fabric API | Recommand for latest version |

----------------
